titles.native: ズドラーストヴィチェ！

description:
On a summer day an strange man who teaches Russian at the beach took me to a town. The familiar town looked totally fresh from a different point of view. The man should be there at the beach tomorrow.

Graduate Work 2015 by Yoko Yuki, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

Prizes:
- ASK? FILM FESTIVAL 2015 11th ANNIVERSARY, ASK? award
- Image forum Festival 2015, audience award
- Inter Collage Animation Festival 2015, audience award
- MPTE AWARDS 2015, Aoi thubasa award

(Source: Geidai Animation)
